description: Product Description Long-Lasting, Non-Drowsy Allergy Relief for the Entire Season 6-Month Supply of Loratadine 10mg Tablets – Relief for Hayfever, Dust, and Pet Allergies Experience 24-hour, non-drowsy relief from the symptoms of hayfever, dust, and pet allergies with Loratadine 10mg Tablets . With 6 months' worth of medication (180 tablets in total), this pack offers long-lasting relief for the entire allergy season and beyond. Whether you're suffering from sneezing, itchy eyes, or a runny nose, Loratadine provides fast, reliable, and gentle relief that won't make you drowsy, ensuring you can stay active and enjoy life without interruption. Effective Relief Without the Drowsiness Other allergy medications, Loratadine 10mg tablets are designed work quickly to alleviate your allergy symptoms without causing drowsiness . Enjoy all-day relief, so you can go about your day, whether at work, school, or outdoor activities. Loratadine blocks histamine to reduce symptoms like sneezing, itchy eyes, and congestion, helping you feel your best while managing your allergies effectively Convenient 6-Month Supply – Ideal for Long-Term Relief Why buy short-term relief when you can stock up for an entire allergy season? With 6 boxes of 30 tablets (180 total tablets), you'll have more than enough to tackle hayfever, dust allergies, and other seasonal allergies throughout the year. This long-term supply is not only more cost-effective but also ensures you’re always prepared, so you don’t run out during peak allergy season. Clinically Proven Allergy Relief, Trusted by Millions Non-Drowsy Formula: Get all-day relief without feeling sleepy or fatigued. 6-Month Supply: 180 tablets to last the entire allergy season or longer. Fast-Acting: Relief from symptoms like sneezing, itchy eyes, and congestion within 1-3 hours. Effective for Multiple Allergies: Works against hayfever, pet dander, dust mites, and more. Convenient and Portable: Easy to take tablets, perfect for home or on-the-go.
